title: chiliocephalum tegetum
intro: Chiliocephalum tegetum is a perennial plant species native to North America, belonging to the family Asteraceae. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, primarily due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds. The plant has been valued for its health benefits, which include treating wounds, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory issues. Chiliocephalum tegetum can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses.
